column1: # Suffix 〜的 — na-adjectives formed with the 的 suffix ("-ic / -al / -ive").
# Belongs here: any X的 word (積極的, 効果的, 一般的). They attach 的 to a noun
# stem and inflect as na-adjectives (的な / 的に). Grouped by this shared form
# rather than by meaning; a plain na-adjective goes in a themed deck instead.
